User.title: User
User.description: User account information, matching their authenticated credentials and setting up profile references.

id.description: The unique user ID matching their Firebase auth UID.

is_admin.description: Whether the user has administrative privileges.

assigned_profile_id.description: The ID of the couple relation profile this user is connected to.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this user record was bootstrapped in Firestore.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: A shared romantic couple relationship profile.

created_by.description: User ID of the partner who initiated the profile.

image_url.description: Profile header or avatar picture URL.

theme.description: Color theme choice of the couple profile space.

created_at.description: Datetime when this profile was setup.

Memory.title: Memory
Memory.description: A saved romantic anniversary or date timeline note.

title.description: Heading or summary of the memory.

description.description: Full rich text description of the event details.

memory_date.description: Date of occurrence in YYYY-MM-DD format.

location.description: Physical location context where the event occurred.

image_url.description: Direct picture URL illustration of this memory.

ProfilePhoto.title: ProfilePhoto
ProfilePhoto.description: A shared polaroid style photo card for the couple's gallery space.

user_id.description: Firebase UID of user who uploaded or registered the link.

owner_name.description: Author or partner name identifier written on the polaroid card.

url.description: Direct file or unsplash image URL.

users/{userId}.description: Stores user credentials mapping, administrative rights, and couple profile IDs of authenticated partners.

profiles/{profileId}.description: Stores relationship profiles connecting two partners with anniversary parameters.

memories/{memoryId}.description: Collection of timeline events and descriptions registered under a specific couple relationship.

photos/{photoId}.description: Polaroid photocard register listed under the pair's collaborative digital wall.
